messages.speaker: tripp>
messages.body: Welcome to Tripp. Terminal. I am the Tripp AI Agent, ready to assist you. Type a command or question to begin.

tools.name: filesystem_read
tools.description: Read files from the active workspace.

tools.name: filesystem_write
tools.description: Write scoped changes into approved workspace paths.

tools.name: filesystem_list
tools.description: List directories and inspect project structure.

tools.name: shell_execute
tools.description: Run bounded shell commands with permission awareness.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search current web sources when freshness matters.

tools.name: code_analyze
tools.description: Inspect code paths and summarize architecture.

tools.name: code_format
tools.description: Apply formatting to supported source files.

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Create scoped commits when explicitly approved.
